name: Timestomping Detection
description: Detects modification of file timestamps to evade forensic analysis
query:
// Detect timestamp modification tools
// Trigger on timestomp, touch with specific timestamps, or PowerShell date manipulation
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(timestomp|touch\s+-t\s+[0-9]{12}|Set-ItemProperty.*LastWriteTime|\$file\.LastWriteTime|NtSetInformationFile)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
